title: Valorous (Victory-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Victory''-class}} {{Otheruses|Valorous}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Valorous/Devotion of Yevetha'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model=[[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]''[[Before the Storm]]'' |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=900 meters''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=[[TIE/rc starfighter]]s |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport=Present |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyer]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Black Fleet Crisis]] **[[Battle of Polneye]] **[[Battle of N'zoth]]''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] *[[Duskhan League]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet=[[Black Fleet]] |owners= |captains=*[[Primate/Legends|Primate]] [[Jip Toorr]] |crewmembers=*[[Jaratt]] |registry= |aliases= *''Valorous'' {{C|under the Empire}} *''Devotion of the Yevetha'' {{C|under the Yevetha}} }} {{Quote|Plat Mallar got close enough to the first ship to interrogate it with his targeting system. It answered as the Imperial Star Destroyer ''Valorous''.''"
"''I know that. And if it was at Polneye under Yevethan command, then you're looking at the biggest fool in the whole Republic.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|}} The '''''Valorous''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] assigned to [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]]. It was later captured by the [[Yevetha]] following an uprising led by them, and the ship was renamed the '''''Devotion of Yevetha''''' or simply the '''''Devotion'''''. ==Characteristics== The ''Valorous'' had large numbers of weapons ports and paired [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] bays on either side of the hull. The fighter complemment included a number of [[TIE/rc starfighter]]s for long-range reconnaissance, and the ship's weaponry was capable of subjugating settlements of considerable size, such as that on [[Polneye]]. By [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], under Yevethan control, the ship's hull may have been painted black.''[[Before the Storm]]'' twice describes the ''Valorous'' and the accompanying [[Liberty (Yevetha)|''Liberty'']] and ''[[Honor]]'' as a trio of "black ships". This may simply be an impressionistic description of the ships silhouetted in the sky, but a dark hull color would fit with the fact that the Yevetha designate the Imperial-type ships they control as the "[[Black Fleet]]." ==History== In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Valorous'' was assigned to [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] and based in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Along with the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']], she was one of two Imperial warships seized substantially intact at [[N'zoth]] by the native [[Yevetha]] in their coup eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Subsequently, together with a number of [[Type II Orbital Repair Yard]]s such as [[Black Fifteen]], plus a number of ships under construction and undergoing repair, they became the nucleus of the [[Black Fleet Crisis|Black Fleet]]. The surviving Imperial crewers from ''Valorous'', along with their counterparts from ''Intimidator'', were sent to [[Pa'aal|Camp Pa'aal]] and forced to assist their captors with the reverse-engineering and copying of Imperial technology, and the two [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] were renamed and incorporated into the fleet of the [[Duskhan League]]. ''Valorous'' thus became ''Devotion of Yevetha''. At some point, the young Yevetha named [[Tal Fraan]] served aboard the ship, working closely with the prisoners.''[[Shield of Lies]]'' However, unbeknownst to the Yevetha, the Imperial survivors they had retained for their technical skill, led by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sil Sorannan]], secretly equipped every Imperial-designed ship in the [[Black Fleet]] with extensive [[slave circuit]]ry which would eventually enable them to regain control. Twelve years later in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], at the onset of the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]], ''Devotion'' was under the command of [[Primate/Legends|Primate]] [[Jip Toorr]], serving as command ship of the other two Duskhan League warships in an assault on the Imperial [[Planet/Legends|world]] of Polneye, along with the similarly black-hulled [[Liberty (Yevetha)|''Liberty'']] and ''[[Honor]]''. Jip Toorr ordered the ''Devotion'' to launch four TIE/rc starfighters under Polenye's atmospheric field to spot for the [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], but the Star Destroyer's [[Tactics Master]] did not anticipate enemy resistance, and [[Plat Mallar]], a [[Grannan]] colonist flying one of the handful of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] left behind by the Empire, shot down one of the scouts. Jip Toorr dismissed the Tactics Master, who committed suicide. The Yevethan battlegroup was able to destroy Polneye without any further casualties, wiping out almost the entire planetary population and enslaving the rest, but Plat Mallar escaped in his lone interceptor, and was discovered by elements of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], as the Duskhan League and the New Republic moved to clash in the [[Battle of N'zoth]] and several other simultaneous engagements throughout the Koornacht Cluster, the Imperial prisoners made their move, and ''Valorous''/''Devotion'' was one of the ships that was designated to play a key role in their escape plan. The remaining Imperials aboard the Star Destroyer, led by an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] named [[Jaratt]], seized control of the ship before she could open fire, and activated her slave circuits. Along with every other remaining Black Sword ship in the Koornacht Cluster, she responded to an unjammable hypercomm signal sent from Sorannan aboard the ''Intimidator'', turning towards [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and making the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ==Behind the scenes== This ship appears in the novel ''[[Before the Storm]]'' by [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]], the first book in the [[The Black Fleet Crisis|''Black Fleet Crisis'' trilogy]]. The ship is named as ''Devotion'', and is stated to be transmitting the ID signal of the missing ship originally known as ''Valorous''. In the next book in the series, ''[[Shield of Lies]]'', the ship briefly appears, without being named, in a recorded image showing the events from the previous novel, while in a separate scene, the ship is referred to in dialogue under the full name of ''Devotion of Yevetha'', as a vessel which the character [[Tal Fraan]] has previously served aboard. In ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'', the concluding novel of the trilogy, the ''Valorous'' is mentioned under her original Imperial name as one of four key ships involved in the Imperial prisoners' escape plan. The vessel later received two entries in 1998's ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', listed under both its original name and the Yevetha-bestowed ''Devotion''. This is the first source to state explicitly that ''Devotion'' is the renamed ''Valorous'', rather than a newly-built copy using a duplicate ID, and also asserts that the ''Valorous'' was one of the nine Star Destroyers captured at [[N'zoth]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], whereas the novels leave open the possibility that this ship was seized elsewhere in the Koornacht Cluster, as the [[Black Nine]] and [[Black Eleven (shipyard)|Black Eleven]] shipyards were. The same additional information was subsequently repeated in other sources, such as ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in 2008. ==Appearances== *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}} {{C|As ''Devotion''}} *[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stID|''Devotion of Yevetha''}} *[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|''Valorous''}} *''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|As ''Devotion'' and ''Valorous''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Captured starships]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Starships of the Imperial Remnant]] [[Category:Victory-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Yevethan starships]]
